siteDescription: Student-led initiatives, dialogue, and campus action at IISER Bhopal.
heroTaglineEn: Build ideas. Lead events. Participate with purpose.
heroTaglineHi: युवा ऊर्जा, संवाद और सार्थक सहभागिता का मंच।
footerText: A student-led platform at IISER Bhopal for youth leadership, campus participation, events, dialogue, and community-driven action.

announcementBar.text: This v1 site uses privacy-safe placeholder media where final approved assets are still being prepared.

focusPillars.title: Dialogue
focusPillars.description: Thoughtful conversations, youth-centered forums, and public speaking spaces that encourage clarity and participation.

focusPillars.title: Participation
focusPillars.description: Events, volunteering, and campus collaborations that turn interest into visible action.

focusPillars.title: Leadership
focusPillars.description: Student-led planning, ownership, teamwork, and execution across activities and initiatives.

focusPillars.title: Documentation
focusPillars.description: Reports, highlights, and visual archives that preserve institutional memory for future student teams.
